name: House Zootia
summary: Raw-material and agricultural house supplying wool, crops, livestock, and other essential inputs to the Principalities.
motive: Remain indispensable by feeding and supplying the broader house network.
power_relations: Economically necessary to fashion, law, and trade houses
current_pressure: pricing pressure from stronger urban actors
visible_membership_base: Farmers, herders, wool workers, grain handlers, quarry labor.
current_tension_or_vulnerability: Indispensability gives leverage, but also makes Zootia vulnerable to extraction by more politically dominant neighbors.
